subject: from Nina
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Nina <nina-mel@mail.ru>
To: jeffrey epstein <littlestjeff@yahoo.com>
Date: Tue, 25 Sep 2007 16:02:08 +0400
Subject: from Nina

> 
> 
> Hello Jeffrey!
> 
> Jeffrey..I know that I lost all my manners. -but i have nothing to do but to ask you about this favor. and this is really the last time- this is my last trip to america,because my 2years visa expires 21october.
> I will not apply for a new visa at least a year,because i wanted to start looking for a job in moscow or somewhere in europe maybe,and to settle down little bit. and i also not sure if i will get it if i apply.
> 
> thats why i wanted to come so much.. :( Is it possible for me to stay in your apartment? of course,if it is not busy at this period,etc.
>  
> I wanted to come 6th oct,and to stay not more than 10-12 days. as i mentioned,my visa is till 21oct.  
> I also really wanted to see you,to say bye-bye,because who knows,maybe i will not come to Nyc again,which is more likely ,if i will find a job..
> 
> I honestly didnt want to bother you with apartment issue ever again,Jeffrey,and I was going to book a hotel,but i've checked all the hotels,and they are so expensive! :( I really didnt expect them to be so expensive.
> 
> Once again,i am sorry for asking you.. i really feel uncomfortable because of this and i understand that i bother you a lot with this flat all the time! sorry! if it's not possible to stay,i will understand.
> 
> big big big kiss,
> 
> Steeve :)
> 
> p.s. besides,i am not red,i am blond already :) :) you have to see me!!
>
body_html:
-----Original Message-----
From: Nina nina-mel@mail.ru
To: jeffrey epstein littlestjeff@yahoo.com
Date: Tue, 25 Sep 2007 16:02:08 +0400
Subject: from Nina

Hello Jeffrey!

Jeffrey..I know that I lost all my manners. -but i have nothing to do but to ask you about this favor. and this is really the last time- this is my last trip to america,because my 2years visa expires 21october.
I will not apply for a new visa at least a year,because i wanted to start looking for a job in moscow or somewhere in europe maybe,and to settle down little bit. and i also not sure if i will get it if i apply.

thats why i wanted to come so much.. :( Is it possible for me to stay in your apartment? of course,if it is not busy at this period,etc.

I wanted to come 6th oct,and to stay not more than 10-12 days. as i mentioned,my visa is till 21oct.
I also really wanted to see you,to say bye-bye,because who knows,maybe i will not come to Nyc again,which is more likely ,if i will find a job..

I honestly didnt want to bother you with apartment issue ever again,Jeffrey,and I was going to book a hotel,but i've checked all the hotels,and they are so expensive! :( I really didnt expect them to be so expensive.

Once again,i am sorry for asking you.. i really feel uncomfortable because of this and i understand that i bother you a lot with this flat all the time! sorry! if it's not possible to stay,i will understand.

big big big kiss,

Steeve :)

p.s. besides,i am not red,i am blond already :) :) you have to see me!!
